mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications (user_uuid, type, title, content, link_url, is_read, created_at) VALUES (#{userUuid}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{linkUrl}, #{isRead}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_uuid, type, title, content, link_url, is_read, created_at FROM notifications WHERE user_uuid = #{userUuid} ORDER BY created_at DESC
